settings.title: Trusted Invisalign Provider in Phoenix, AZ

icon_list.text: 4855 East Warner Rd Suite B9, Phoenix, AZ 85044, USA

settings.editor:
With Invisalign clear aligners, you’ll see first-hand why clear aligners are so popular with adults and teenagers alike! Traditional, metal braces are highly effective for severe cases of misalignment, but if you are a mild to moderate case, you can enjoy all the benefits of traditional braces without any of the discomfort or embarrassment of metal braces. Call Dental by Design today to see how this is possible! 

Just like traditional metal braces, Invisalign clear aligners will slowly move your teeth into proper positioning. With clear braces, you will get the same long-lasting results with the benefit of discretion and privacy. Invisalign clear aligners are practically invisible! They can also be removed up to 2 hours a day, so you can eat and brush your teeth unhindered.

We believe having a budget should not prevent you from getting the dental care you need! For our patients who are interested in financing their treatments, we offer in-house interest free financing plans for all our patients. If you are interested in setting up a plan with our in-house financing, our knowledgeable team would be glad to help you get started. Give us a call today!.

settings.sg_text_before: See Your Results Before We Start

settings.editor: At Dental by Design, we use the latest technology, like the iTero Digital Scanner that creates a 3D image of your teeth in just minutes. You can visualize your new smile before starting your treatment.

settings.description_text: Virtually invisible
Little to no speech disruption
No food restrictions

settings.editor:
At Dental by Design you can achieve the beautiful smile you’ve always wanted, without the discomfort and look of traditional metal braces, using Invisalign®.
The Invisalign® system straightens teeth with a series of custom-fitted, clear, removable aligners. The results speak for themselves and the perks are undeniably awesome:

settings.description_text: No special tools for brushing and flossing
No worrying about sharp wires or breaking brackets
Shorter average treatment time
Affordable and barely noticeable
Completely removable
Eat and drink your favorite foods
Maintain proper oral hygiene easier
Straight teeth
Healthier teeth
More even chewing
Easier to clean and floss effectively
A complimentary consultation followed by an examination and X-Rays.
A complimentary consultation followed by an examination and X-Rays.
A complimentary consultation followed by an examination and X-Rays.
A complimentary consultation followed by an examination and X-Rays.
At our top-of-the-line dental office, we create a custom treatment plan for each patient. That way your best smile can be restored and we can help you get relief from any discomfort.
It is our mission to provide an environment where we can create lasting relationships with our patients. We will always ensure that you understand and are comfortable with your treatment options.
Enjoy a dental office environment just as clean and beautiful as your new smile. We offer a coffee bar and complimentary water bottles to help you feel as welcome as possible.
Our focus is on delivering high-quality, lasting dental care. Rest easy knowing we take pride in our work and use the best materials, dental labs, and techniques.

settings.editor:
Dr Kodi has been my Dentist for over 20 yrs

now and my recent work to correct a lifetime of grinded teeth has been not only beyond my expectations but exquisitely so. His entire office and practice is devoted to their purpose and their manner is beyond reproach. There are not enough superlatives to describe my gratitude for their care and attention to detail. If you need the smallest of procedures or the largest of restorations like myself, this is the Dentist, this the practice, and Dental by Design is the place.


Brien Durham
